step_rationale: Endothelial dysfunction and activation biomarker; plaque formation and rupture indicator.
mechanism: Endocan marks endothelial activation, dysfunction and erosion that expose thrombogenic subendothelial surfaces in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Analysis of Serum Endothelial Cell-Specific Molecule 1 (Endocan) Level in Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus With Acute ST-Segment Elevation Myocardial Infarction and its Correlation: A Pilot Study.
